inquiries.name: Yosabanta Swain
inquiries.content: We need a bulk order of 5,000 units of SURGE SUPPRESSORS. Please provide the lead time and the best possible discounted price. We are looking to finalize this by Friday.

inquiries.name: Sreejith
inquiries.content: Looking for Atmel NOR Flash IC variants. Do you have the AT45DB321E model in stock? If not, could you suggest a direct equivalent that is available for immediate shipping?
